paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32, with a change of -3.95% compared to the prior close and -20.9% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 23, 2026.

There are 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours, including a report on Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built near Pantex, and an announcement regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

Recent SEC filings include the appointment of four new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
